2026-05-07ESDCCanadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety ActReappointment of a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and SafetyReappointment of Kimberly Gail Malazine Boland of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 20, 2026.N/A
act: Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety Act
subject: Reappointment of a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety
precis: Reappointment of Kimberly Gail Malazine Boland of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 20, 2026.
